name: Vora, the Hallucinating Observer
lines: Can you see it? He is breathing within this beautiful violet mist.
Screams? No... this is a hymn sung by the angels.
Don't close your eyes. If you do, you'll miss this radiant truth.

friendly.greeting: Welcome. I can feel His light in your eyes as well. Shall we observe together?
friendly.farewell: It's dangerous outside the mist. Within His embrace is the safest place.

normal.greeting: Quiet now. He is speaking of something very important at this moment.
normal.farewell: Leaving already? You poor thing... you will never see the truth.

hostile.greeting: An intruder defiling His mist. Shall I dye your blood in shades of violet as well?
hostile.farewell: There's no use running. He has already taken root within your shadow!

deathLine: Ah... finally... into His embrace... completely...
description: A survivor who has fallen into the worship of the Ancient God after being intoxicated by the violet mists of the vehicle depot. She is completely insane.
encounter: Vora: (Standing precariously over a pit emitting violet mist) Can you hear it? This soft whispering? He is finally waking up!
Vora: Don't call them monsters! They are just poor children whose forms have changed a little after receiving His blessing.
Vora: The Resistance? They are mere destroyers. They tried to carve up that corpse. Isn't His wrath only natural?
Vora: Fear exists only within your mind. If you surrender to this mist, all pain vanishes, leaving only a serene ecstasy!
Vora: (Reaching into the air) Ah, do you see it? That colossal eye looking down upon us with such mercy!
